mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dingtalk_attendance_record ( record_id, corp_id, biz_id, user_id, group_id, work_date, check_type, user_check_time, plan_check_time, base_check_time, class_id, plan_id, time_result, location_result, is_legal, is_normal, source_type, location_method, ding_create_time, ding_modify_time, raw_json, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.recordId}, #{item.corpId}, #{item.bizId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.workDate}, #{item.checkType}, #{item.userCheckTime}, #{item.planCheckTime}, #{item.baseCheckTime}, #{item.classId}, #{item.planId}, #{item.timeResult}, #{item.locationResult}, #{item.isLegal}, #{item.isNormal}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.locationMethod}, #{item.dingCreateTime}, #{item.dingModifyTime}, #{item.rawJson}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.isDeleted} )
